description: Case dimensions: 24 mm x 24 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: SquareSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortSteel strap with tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack and steel coloured dial with branding and brand logoQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
